mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.worker_code, w.worker_name, w.status, w.max_accounts, w.current_accounts, w.last_heartbeat_time, w.heartbeat_expire_seconds, w.version, w.host_name, w.ip_address, w.remark, w.created_at, w.updated_at, w.deleted_at, IFNULL(c.cnt, 0) AS live_assigned_account_count FROM btg_mt5_worker w LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.assigned_worker_id AS wid, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM btg_user_profile p INNER JOIN btg_user u ON u.id = p.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 1 WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.assigned_worker_id IS NOT NULL AND p.trading_account_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.trading_account_id) <> '' AND p.server_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.server_name) <> '' GROUP BY p.assigned_worker_id) c ON c.wid = w.id WHERE w.deleted_at IS NULL AND w.status = 1 AND w.last_heartbeat_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, w.last_heartbeat_time, #{now}) <= w.heartbeat_expire_seconds AND IFNULL(c.cnt, 0) < w.max_accounts ORDER BY IFNULL(c.cnt, 0) ASC, w.last_heartbeat_time DESC, w.worker_code ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM btg_user_profile p INNER JOIN btg_user u ON u.id = p.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 1 WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.assigned_worker_id = #{workerDbId} AND p.trading_account_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.trading_account_id) <> '' AND p.server_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.server_name) <> ''

SELECT u.id AS userId, p.real_name AS realName, u.mobile AS mobile, p.server_name AS serverName, p.trading_account_id AS tradingAccountId, p.trading_account_password AS tradingAccountPassword, p.exchange_uid AS exchangeUid, p.assigned_worker_id AS assignedWorkerId, w.worker_code AS assignedWorkerCode FROM btg_user_profile p INNER JOIN btg_user u ON u.id = p.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 1 LEFT JOIN btg_mt5_worker w ON w.id = p.assigned_worker_id AND w.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.assigned_worker_id = #{workerDbId} AND p.trading_account_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.trading_account_id) <> ''
